summary: Completed Phase 1+2 testing for ScriptM8: Home screen redesign with Quick Actions, Daily Actor Drill, reorganized sections (Training, Rehearsal, Recording, Tools). Backend Daily Drill and Streak APIs fully functional. Fixed LlmChat API call issue.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Fixed: server.py line 2548 - Changed send_message_async to send_message and added .with_model() for LlmChat
✅ Home screen (index.tsx): Quick Rehearse (purple) and Quick Self Tape (red) buttons at top
✅ Home screen: Daily Actor Drill card with +25 XP badge, flame icon
✅ Home screen: 4 reorganized sections - Training, Rehearsal, Recording, Tools
✅ Home screen: NO 'Training Modes', 'AI Coaching', 'Script Tools' sections (correctly removed)
✅ Home screen: Streak row shows only when current_streak > 0 (correct behavior)
✅ Daily Drill screen: Streak banner (current streak, best streak, total XP)
✅ Daily Drill screen: Challenge card with prompt, duration (15s), XP reward (+25)
✅ Daily Drill screen: Complete button awards XP, shows success state
✅ Voice Studio screen: Coming soon placeholder with feature list
✅ Navigation: Quick Rehearse → /scripts (when no scripts) or /script/{id}
✅ _layout.tsx: Routes for daily-drill and voice-studio properly registered
✅ API: GET /api/daily-drill/{user_id} - creates/returns daily drill with AI-generated or fallback prompts
✅ API: POST /api/daily-drill/{user_id}/complete - awards 25 XP, updates streak
✅ API: GET /api/streak/{user_id} - returns streak data (current, best, total_xp, activities_today)
✅ API: POST /api/streak/{user_id}/record - records activity, updates streak
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed LlmChat API call for daily drill generation)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and navigation verified via Playwright

test_credentials: No auth needed. Used device_id like 'test-drill-user-*' for API tests.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* prefixed drill/streak records during testing (auto-cleanup not needed as unique IDs used)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1+2 testing complete. Home screen has new layout with Quick Actions at top, Daily Drill card, and 4 sections (Training, Rehearsal, Recording, Tools). Old sections removed. Daily Drill and Streak APIs working. Voice Studio is placeholder 'coming soon'. Fixed LlmChat.send_message_async to .send_message with .with_model().

tests_performed.test: Health check API
GET /api/daily-drill/{user_id} creates new drill
GET /api/daily-drill returns same drill same day
POST /api/daily-drill/{user_id}/complete awards XP
POST /api/daily-drill already completed returns 0 XP
POST /api/daily-drill nonexistent returns 404
GET /api/streak/{user_id} new user returns zeros
Streak updates after drill completion
POST /api/streak/{user_id}/record records activity
Multiple activities same day don't double count streak
Drill has valid duration
Drill prompt is not empty
Home screen: Quick Rehearse button (purple, large)
Home screen: Quick Self Tape button (red, large)
Home screen: Daily Actor Drill card with +25 XP
Home screen: Training section (Acting Coach, Dialect Coach)
Home screen: Rehearsal section (Practice Scene, Scripts)
Home screen: Recording section (Self Tape Studio, Voice Studio)
Home screen: Tools section (Audition Tracker, My Scripts)
Home screen: NO Training Modes section
Home screen: NO old AI Coaching section
Home screen: NO old Script Tools section
Navigation: Quick Rehearse → /scripts
Navigation: Quick Self Tape → /selftape
Navigation: Daily Actor Drill → /daily-drill
Navigation: Voice Studio → /voice-studio
Daily Drill screen: Streak banner visible
Daily Drill screen: Challenge card with prompt
Daily Drill screen: Complete button works
Daily Drill screen: Shows success after completion
Voice Studio screen: Coming soon placeholder
Voice Studio screen: Feature list visible

bug_fix_applied.issue: LlmChat was using send_message_async() which doesn't exist; also missing .with_model()
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed to .with_model('openai', 'gpt-4o') and send_message() for async context
